title: Invalid request IP detected due to reverse proxy misconfiguration
symptom: n8n logs show a validation error regarding an invalid request IP when accessed through a reverse proxy.
applies_when: Using n8n behind a reverse proxy
not_this_if: n8n is accessed directly without a reverse proxy
root_cause: When n8n is deployed behind a reverse proxy, it relies on specific headers to determine the original client IP address. If these headers are not forwarded correctly by the proxy, n8n cannot validate the request IP, leading to errors.
fix_steps: Ensure the reverse proxy is configured to forward 'X-Forwarded-For', 'X-Forwarded-Host', and 'X-Forwarded-Proto' headers.
Restart the reverse proxy and n8n instance to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Configure your reverse proxy to forward the necessary headers for client IP detection.
